section_miscategorizations.reason: Stated as an active diagnosis rather than a symptom or patient-reported history; belongs in the diagnostic impression/active problems list.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of mitral regurgitation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past cardiac diagnosis fits better under problem list/diagnostic impression; inclusion in HPI is not misleading but is organizationally suboptimal.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of atrial fibrillation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past diagnosis aligns more with active problems/diagnostic history; acceptable in HPI for context but more appropriate in Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of chest discomfort.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Represents a summarized problem history rather than current symptom description; could be better organized under problem list/assessment, though not clearly misleading in HPI.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of diabetes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Chronic comorbidity fits standard problem list/assessment; presence in HPI is common but less precise for section semantics given.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of asthma.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Chronic comorbidity is more appropriate as an active/past problem in Assessment; inclusion in HPI is organizational rather than content-driven.
